title: RIS Curved Backgrounds Dataset v1 (N=512-2048)
description: Open dataset for robustness verification of RIS under curved backgrounds (FLRW and Schwarzschild). Scope: N={512,1024,2048}, 6 configurations, 10 repeats per configuration, 180 total trials. Includes cost analysis, quality-check reports, and citation metadata.
notes: Companion open dataset for the poset_phase research line. Archive SHA256: 7f910be71aa008c10c88dc8a2f8faf456e705950eef8473562b500f4a49736de
